ksa_text: Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data flows, access patterns, and retention practices against privacy requirements and privacy-by-design principles.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Security & Privacy (affinity 0.55); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is moderate-to-strong (0.4138). A AI Governance Manager would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Governance Manager whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
